_comment: DOME Registry user account example — v1.0.0. This is a fictionalised example of a DOME Registry user account record. No real personal data is used. System fields (_id, __v) that are assigned server-side are shown here for illustrative completeness only; omit them when creating a new account. The _id shown here would be the value referenced in the 'user' field of any DOME Registry entry owned by this account.
name: Alex
